credentials_required: Gmail OAuth2 — connect via n8n Credentials > Gmail OAuth2 API. Name it 'Gmail OAuth2'.

Google Sheets OAuth2 — connect via n8n Credentials > Google Sheets OAuth2 API. Name it 'Google Sheets OAuth2'. Create a sheet named 'Leads' with columns: Date, Name, Email, Company, Role Needed, Notes, Conversation ID, Status, Source.
Telegram API — already configured as 'Semeadora Bot'. chatId: 757037706.
after_import: 1. Replace SHEET_ID_PLACEHOLDER in 'Google Sheets - Add Lead' node with your actual Sheet ID (from the URL: /spreadsheets/d/SHEET_ID/edit).
3. Copy the webhook URL (shown after activation) and paste into backend/config.json under webhooks.onLeadCaptured.
